case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. JOSHUA BERGER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 235 EDDY STREET #202 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED DEC-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BERGER, JOSHUA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.36 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK
